title: Super Mario Bros. 3 Glitched Up World 5
description: World 5 with the code NSEZZE enabled. I had better and more epic strange glitches on the first recording, but then the video had no sound for some bullcrap reason. =( So this is unfortunately my second recording. I've encountered more "crashing sounds" on this world, possibly because of the falling donut platforms. I've also got to hear some new glitched music that would sound familiar from other games.
